policyResults.description: Checks a JWT credential by verifying its cryptographic signature using the key referenced by the DID in `iss`.
Verifies a Verifiable Presentation against a Presentation Definition, including relational constraints.
Checks a JWT credential by verifying its cryptographic signature using the key referenced by the DID in `iss`.
Sends the credential data to an webhook URL as HTTP POST, and returns the verified status based on the webhooks set status code (success = 200 - 299).
